name: enCore Energy Corp.
description: enCore Energy Corp. is a leading U.S. domestic uranium producer focused on providing clean, reliable, and carbon-free fuel. As the first new U.S. uranium producer in a decade, the company utilizes In-Situ Recovery (ISR) technology to extract uranium, a proven method with minimal environmental impact. With a portfolio of assets across Texas, Wyoming, and South Dakota, enCore Energy is committed to supporting energy security and the global transition to sustainable energy through its production and development of high-quality uranium resources.
